    Serialisierte Form

    • Package de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model

      • Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RotatableIconLabel

        class RotatableIconLabel extends JLabel implements Serializable

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • angle
            double angle
            The current rotation angle in degrees (0-360)
          • icon
            com.formdev.flatlaf.extras.FlatSVGIcon icon
            The SVG icon to be displayed and rotated

    • Package de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view

      • Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view.BookingPanel

        class BookingPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • allStations
            List<Station> allStations
            List of all available stations for route display
          • endCombo
            JComboBox<Station> endCombo
            Dropdown for selecting the arrival station
          • loadingLabel
            RotatableIconLabel loadingLabel
            Animated loading indicator shown during searches
          • resultTable
            JTable resultTable
            Table displaying the search results
          • rotationTimer
            Timer rotationTimer
            Timer controlling the loading animation rotation
          • routeOptionDAO
            RouteOptionDAO routeOptionDAO
            DAO for querying route options from the database
          • startCombo
            JComboBox<Station> startCombo
            Dropdown for selecting the departure station
          • tableModel
            DefaultTableModel tableModel
            Table model managing the result data

      • Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view.MainFrame

        class MainFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view.MapPanel

        class MapPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialisierte Felder

          • activeTrains
            List<AnimatedTrain> activeTrains
            List of currently active trains being animated on the map
          • animationTimer
            Timer animationTimer
            Timer for animation updates (16ms = ~60 FPS)
          • dataRefreshTimer
            Timer dataRefreshTimer
            Timer for refreshing train data from database (300ms)
          • isPause
            boolean isPause
            Flag indicating whether simulation is paused
          • pauseIcon
            ImageIcon pauseIcon
            Icon for pause button (unused field, but kept for compatibility)
          • playBtn
            JButton playBtn
            Button for play/pause control
          • playIcon
            ImageIcon playIcon
            Icon for play button (unused field, but kept for compatibility)
          • segments
            List<TrackSegment> segments
            List of all track segments connecting stations
          • stationMap
            Map<Integer,Station> stationMap
            Map of station IDs to Station objects for quick lookup
          • timeLabel
            JLabel timeLabel
            Label displaying the current simulation time
          • tripDAO
            TripDAO tripDAO
            DAO for querying currently running trips
